title: STUDY_TIMER
desc: Retro-futurist focus clock with phosphor CRT display, session presets, and six deck themes. Runs in-browser with no backend.
overview: A Vue 3 study session terminal styled like cassette-futurism control panels: countdown display, tape-segment progress, configuration popover, and theme profiles persisted in localStorage.
challenge: Ship a polished solo-project timer that feels like a physical deck unit while staying readable, accessible, and deployable as a static demo on this portfolio site.
outcome: Fully interactive timer with GitHub Pages hosting at /projects/timer/demo/, auto-saving preferences, tab-title telemetry, and semantic green/red controls separate from theme phosphor colors.
highlights: Six CRT phosphor themes plus a custom accent profile built from CSS variables
CONFIG popover anchored to the header so the main chrono display stays visible
Session length presets, manual override, and factory reset with immediate apply
Production build scripted from the study-timer repo into public/projects/timer/demo/

title: PROJECT_TEMPLATE
desc: Template entry for my project pages. Copy in projects.json, set listed to true, and fill in my project.
overview: Schema reference for list cards, detail panels, metrics, highlights, and links. Not shown on the public projects index.
highlights: Bullet one: key technical or product outcome
Bullet two: architecture or process highlight
Bullet three: impact or reliability note
